tough_skin.name: Thick Hide
tough_skin.desc: Tough leather from a resilient creature. Can be crafted into basic armor.

rock_skin.name: Living Rock Fragments
rock_skin.desc: Stone-like material that retains some of the creature's defensive properties.

metal_skin.name: Metallic Fragments
metal_skin.desc: Metal-infused organic material with natural armor properties.

magical_resistance.name: Anti-Magic Essence
magical_resistance.desc: A crystalline substance that repels magical energy.

armored_plates.name: Segmented Carapace
armored_plates.desc: Flexible yet strong armored plates that deflect critical strikes.

regeneration.name: Regenerative Tissue
regeneration.desc: Living tissue that continues to heal even after removal.

rapid_healing.name: Phoenix Cells
rapid_healing.desc: Miraculous cells that can rapidly regenerate any wound.

claws.name: Sharp Claws
claws.desc: Natural claws that retain their sharpness. Useful for crafting weapons.

razor_claws.name: Razor Talons
razor_claws.desc: Incredibly sharp claws that cause bleeding wounds.

venomous_claws.name: Venom Sacs
venomous_claws.desc: Poison glands that can be harvested for toxin extraction.

bite_attack.name: Sharp Fangs
bite_attack.desc: Pointed teeth perfect for piercing attacks.

crushing_bite.name: Crusher Molars
crushing_bite.desc: Massive teeth capable of crushing through armor.

tail_swipe.name: Flexible Tail Section
tail_swipe.desc: A section of powerful tail muscle for crafting whips.

spiked_tail.name: Tail Spikes
spiked_tail.desc: Sharp spikes from a creature's tail, perfect for projectiles.

multiattack.name: Combat Coordination Gland
multiattack.desc: A rare gland that enhances reflexes and attack coordination.

fire_breath.name: Flame Gland
fire_breath.desc: Internal organ that produces intense fire. Contains fire essence.

ice_breath.name: Frost Core
ice_breath.desc: A crystalline organ that generates freezing temperatures.

poison_breath.name: Toxic Lung Tissue
poison_breath.desc: Poisonous respiratory tissue that creates deadly toxins.

lightning_breath.name: Storm Chamber
lightning_breath.desc: Bio-electric organ that generates lightning strikes.

acid_spit.name: Acid Bladder
acid_spit.desc: Corrosive organ that produces powerful acid.

fear_aura.name: Terror Essence
fear_aura.desc: Concentrated fear that radiates from the creature's presence.

paralyzing_gaze.name: Petrifying Eye
paralyzing_gaze.desc: An eye that retains its paralyzing power even after death.

invisibility.name: Phase Membrane
invisibility.desc: Translucent tissue that can bend light around itself.

teleport.name: Dimensional Node
teleport.desc: A small organ that can tear holes in space-time.

flight.name: Aerial Membrane
flight.desc: Lightweight wing membrane that defies gravity.

burrow.name: Earth Shaper Claws
burrow.desc: Specialized claws designed for digging through solid rock.

climb.name: Adhesive Pads
climb.desc: Natural climbing pads that stick to any surface.

swim.name: Gill Slits
swim.desc: Functional gills that allow underwater breathing.

echolocation.name: Glowing Crystals
echolocation.desc: Dim crystal shards from minor magical beasts. Used in elixirs and low-tier enchantments.

camouflage.name: Scent Glands
camouflage.desc: Musky glands from scavengers and predators. Used in repellents and tracking mixtures.

pack_leader.name: Alpha Pheromones
pack_leader.desc: Chemical signals that command respect from lesser creatures.

size_change.name: Growth Hormone Gland
size_change.desc: Gland that controls dramatic size changes.

phase_shift.name: Ethereal Essence
phase_shift.desc: Pure spirit energy that exists between dimensions.

ancient_knowledge.name: Memory Crystal
ancient_knowledge.desc: Crystallized knowledge from an ancient mind.

nature_communion.name: Nature Essence
nature_communion.desc: Pure essence of natural life force, useful for herbalism.

elemental_mastery.name: Elemental Heart
elemental_mastery.desc: The core of an elemental being, pulsing with pure elemental energy.

void_magic.name: Void Essence
void_magic.desc: Dark essence from the space between dimensions.

time_manipulation.name: Time Crystal
time_manipulation.desc: A crystal that exists outside normal time flow.

monster_charge_attack.name: Energy Gland
monster_charge_attack.desc: Stores burst energy from fast, aggressive beasts. Used in stamina potions and hearty meals.
